result.summary: Agora exposes multiple REST APIs (Conversational AI, RTC/Channel Management, Signaling, Chat, Cloud Recording, and Console), a public docs MCP server at https://mcp.agora.io with no documented auth, and an Agora CLI/local MCP mode authenticated via `agora login`; HTTP APIs mainly use Basic auth with Agora Customer ID/Secret, while some use Agora-generated bearer tokens from your App ID/App Certificate.

agora_rest_basic.label: Agora REST API customer ID and customer secret
agora_rest_basic.setup: In [Agora Console](https://console.agora.io/v2), go to **Developer Toolkit** → **RESTful API**, click **Add a secret**, then **Download** the generated `key_and_secret.txt`. Use the downloaded **Customer ID** and **Customer Secret** to form HTTP Basic auth as `Authorization: Basic <base64(customer_id:customer_secret)>`. The secret can only be downloaded once, so store it securely.

agora_app_token.label: Agora app token generated from App ID and App Certificate
agora_app_token.setup: In [Agora Console](https://console.agora.io/v2), open your project and obtain its `App ID` and `App Certificate`. Generate the token on your own server using Agora's token libraries, such as the [Conversational AI SDK token utility](https://docs.agora.io/en/api-reference/api-ref/conversational-ai/authentication) or the [AgoraDynamicKey libraries](https://github.com/AgoraIO/Tools/tree/master/DynamicKey/AgoraDynamicKey). For Conversational AI and Flexible Classroom, send it in `Authorization` as `agora token=<your_token>`. Keep the `App Certificate` server-side only.

agora_cli_session.label: Agora CLI logged-in session
agora_cli_session.setup: Install the CLI using the instructions in the [Agora CLI README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgoraIO/cli/main/README.md), then run `agora login` to authenticate the CLI on the host. The README states the CLI handles login/logout/session inspection through `auth`, and that the local MCP mode uses the host's authenticated CLI session.

variables.description: Agora App ID for your project.
